svg.title: Kitchen reporting output
svg.desc: The produced kitchen/meal report and filtered kitchen report output that preserves dietary/allergy details and guest-specific wording for multi-name reservations.

g.text: For dinner service Thursday, June 26 · Printed 3:14 PM · Page 1 of 2
Allergy-only mode prints just the flagged rows for the kitchen line — same wording, no meal
counts. Office-only guest notes never appear here.
Yellow Point Lodge · Kitchen Report · standard letter — confidential to kitchen & office
